On 14 February 2023, Pharrell Williams was named creative director of men's wear.
Retrieved 15 August 2022 . ^ "Pharrell Williams Named Next Louis Vuitton Men's Creative Director" .
In 2007, Kris Van Assche was appointed as the new artistic director of Dior Homme.
In 2016, Maria Grazia Chiuri was named the women's artistic director for Dior.
In March 2018, Kim Jones was named the men's artistic director for the house.
In October 2021, Dior appointed Francis Kurkdjian as its new creative director of perfume.
In 2025, Jonathan Anderson was appointed as Dior’s new Creative Director of women's, men's and haute couture collections of the house, succeeding Kim Jones & Maria Grazia Chiuri.
Retrieved 8 August 2025 . ^ "Jonathan Anderson Appointed Creative Director at Dior" .

In February 2013, Jacobs was named the new creative director for Diet Coke .
Retrieved October 26, 2022 . ^ "Marc Jacobs named Diet Coke creative director" .
In January 2015, Bizzarri appointed Alessandro Michele as the creative director of Gucci.

In January 2023, Sabato de Sarno was appointed creative director of Gucci  to "reestablish Gucci's edge" and "restore its brand equity", after the Bizzarri/Michele success had also eroded Gucci's luxury glow.
Italian designer Pierpaolo Piccioli became Creative Director of Balenciaga in July 2025.
In 1992, Josephus Thimister was appointed artistic director and reinterpreted the brand through a bold minimalist approach.
In 1997, Nicolas Ghesquière was appointed Artistic Director of Balenciaga.
In December 2000 the Gucci Group acquired 51% of his company and appointed him as Creative Director  before launching stores in London,  Milan,  New York,  Los Angeles  and Las Vegas.
Pina Ferlisi was appointed as the creative director for the line in June 2010.
Andrea Perrone took over as CEO  and appointed Alessandro Dell'Acqua as creative director of womenswear in May 2010,  but the brand discontinued its women's line the following year.
In July 2012, Brendan Mullane was appointed creative director of Brioni.
In March 2016, Justin O’Shea was appointed creative director of Brioni.
On March 23, 2016, luxury conglomerate Kering announced that it had appointed Justin O’Shea, a heavily tattooed Australian and street-style enthusiast, as  creative director.
In March 2017, Fabrizio Malverdi became the new CEO of Brioni,   and appointed Nina-Maria Nitsche as creative director in June 2017,  who was credited for revitalizing Brioni.
In May 2017, Stuart Weitzman Holdings, LLC, appointed Giovanni Morelli as Creative Director and Weitzman stepped down from his role.
January 6, 2015. ^ Allen, Rachael (August 9, 2016). "Stuart Weitzman's Changing Of The Guard: Giovanni Morelli Named Creative Director" .
In May 2024, Calvin Klein appointed Veronica Leoni Creative Director of the brand's newly revived Collection line.
In July 2016, it was announced that Celine boss Marco Gobbetti would become CEO of Burberry plc, while Bailey became the Creative Director with the title of President.
In March 2018, Burberry named Riccardo Tisci , creative director at Givenchy from 2005 to 2017, as the brand's chief creative officer.
